docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,585.00 FILED BY ATHENA DENTAL GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT MCCALL, LUCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON APR-16-2026 BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATHENA DENTAL GROUP
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATHENA DENTAL GROUP
DECLARATION OF CURRENT ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCALL, LUCY
ORDER TO CONTINUE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2026 - CONTINUED PER THE COURT TO APR-16-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ATHENA DENTAL GROUP IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY DEEPAK BALANI, OWNER. DEFENDANT LUCY MCCALL IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF IS TO PROVIDE A COPY OF THE CLAIM AND EXHIBITS TO THE DEFENDANT BY MARCH 9TH AND THE DEFENDANT IS TO PROVIDE EXHIBITS TO THE PLAINTIFF BY MARCH 19TH. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF WITH A ZOOM APPEARANCE FOR THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 3/17/26. CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO MCCALL VIA COURT MAIL (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE
EXHIBITS RECEIVED BY MAIL FROM PLAINTIFF ATHENA DENTAL GROUP
DECLARATION RE: ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATHENA DENTAL GROUP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE - PLAINTIFF ATHENA DENTAL GROUP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DEEPAK BELANI VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT LUCY MCCALL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATHENA DENTAL GROUP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCCALL, LUCY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
